title: a 1.8.9 pvp in 1.21.11
description: This data pack enables 1.8.9 pvp on the latest version 1.21.11.
body:
1. This data pack allows you to do 1.8.9 pvp in 1.21.11, 
2. but there is one thing you should know. In 1.8.9, sword blocking does not completely block damage, but only reduces it by 50%. 
3. if you do not apply the resource pack, it may feel unnatural.
